option.name: requestToText
option.value:
<CachedHttpClientTabRequests> <entry key="e42a75cf78d5b13649a87397faf8f649dcbd0b43" value="###
GET http://localhost:8080/auth/welcome" /> <entry key="2b5567bb853bbd785a19c4f1221ca8c58618a0ce" value="###
POST http://localhost:8080/auth/generateToken
Content-Type: application/json

{
 "username": "email@gmail.com",
 "password": "123"
}" /> <entry key="cb4e9d2dc336e1ff4d8d23ff7aafc9553cc90e9b" value="###
GET http://localhost:8080/auth/user/userProfile" /> <entry key="d35607c879287958c17dd70223082ece1491806b" value="###
POST http://localhost:8080/auth/addNewUser
Content-Type: application/json

{
 "id": 0,
 "name": "",
 "email": "",
 "password": "",
 "roles": ""
}" /> </CachedHttpClientTabRequests>
